'''Jargool Muus''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was one of a group of bounty hunters led by [[Zinn Classet]] that were tasked by authorities representing the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Spice Mines of Kessel]] to hunt several [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] operatives who had freed one of their [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Kentara]]. He was strong, intimidating, violent, and rude with a love of big weapons. Muus enjoyed interacting with others, then [[Death/Legends|killing]] them.
